title: Top Species Found
query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Species_Localised) FROM ScanOrganic WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate AND ScanType = 'Analyse' AND Species_Localised IS NOT NULL
detailQuery: SELECT Species_Localised AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM ScanOrganic WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate AND ScanType = 'Analyse' AND Species_Localised IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Species_Localised ORDER BY value DESC
